  • Terminally Deprecated Elements
    Element
    Description
    org.apache.jena.assembler.Assembler.general
    use Assembler.general()
    org.apache.jena.assembler.Assembler.ontModel
    Use org.apache.jena.ontapi
    org.apache.jena.assembler.Assembler.ontModelSpec
    Use org.apache.jena.ontapi
    org.apache.jena.assembler.assemblers.OntModelAssembler
    org.apache.jena.assembler.assemblers.OntModelSpecAssembler
    org.apache.jena.graph.Triple.getMatchObject()
    Use Triple.getObject().
    org.apache.jena.graph.Triple.getMatchPredicate()
    Use Triple.getPredicate().
    org.apache.jena.graph.Triple.getMatchSubject()
    Use Triple.getSubject().

    Use org.apache.jena.ontapi.
    org.apache.jena.ontology.OntModelSpec
    Use org.apache.jena.ontapi.
    org.apache.jena.rdf.model.DoesNotReifyException
    Do not use.
    org.apache.jena.rdf.model.Model.write(OutputStream)
    Use write(OutputStream, "RDF/XML")
    org.apache.jena.rdf.model.Model.write(Writer)
    Use write(Writer, "RDF/XML")

    Use org.apache.jena.ontapi.

    Use org.apache.jena.ontapi.

    Use org.apache.jena.ontapi.

    Use org.apache.jena.ontapi.

    Use org.apache.jena.ontapi.
    org.apache.jena.rdf.model.ModelFactory.createOntologyModel(OntModelSpec, Model)
    Use org.apache.jena.ontapi.

    Description

    Class
    Description
    org.apache.jena.assembler.assemblers.OntModelAssembler
    org.apache.jena.assembler.assemblers.OntModelSpecAssembler
    org.apache.jena.memvalue.GraphMemValue
    Applications should be using GraphMemFactory.createDefaultGraph() for a general purpose graph or GraphMemFactory.createDefaultGraphSameValue() if necessary implementation.
    org.apache.jena.ontology.OntModelSpec
    Use org.apache.jena.ontapi.
    org.apache.jena.rdfxml.arp1.ARP
    Direct access to the RDF/XML parser is planned for removal. Please contact the Jena development community for details.
    org.apache.jena.util.LocatorClassLoader
    Use StreamManager and LocatorClassLoader from org.apache.jena.riot.system.stream.
    org.apache.jena.util.LocatorFile
    Use StreamManager and LocatorFile from org.apache.jena.riot.system.stream.
    org.apache.jena.util.LocatorURL
    Use StreamManager and LocatorHTTP from org.apache.jena.riot.system.stream.
    org.apache.jena.util.LocatorZip
    Use StreamManager and LocatorZip from org.apache.jena.riot.system.stream.
    org.apache.jena.util.XMLChar
    Use XML10Char,

    Exception Class
    Description
    org.apache.jena.rdf.model.DoesNotReifyException
    Do not use.
  • Deprecated Fields
    Field
    Description
    org.apache.jena.assembler.Assembler.general
    use Assembler.general()
    org.apache.jena.assembler.Assembler.ontModel
    Use org.apache.jena.ontapi
    org.apache.jena.assembler.Assembler.ontModelSpec
    Use org.apache.jena.ontapi
    org.apache.jena.rdfxml.arp1.ARPErrorNumbers.ERR_ABOUTEACH_NOT_TOPLEVEL
    No longer occurs. Any use of rdf:aboutEach is a syntax error.
    org.apache.jena.rdfxml.arp1.ARPErrorNumbers.ERR_INTERNAL_ERROR
    No longer used.
    org.apache.jena.rdfxml.arp1.ARPErrorNumbers.ERR_STRING_NOT_NORMAL_FORM_C
    See 2nd Last Call docs * (E207).
    org.apache.jena.rdfxml.arp1.ARPErrorNumbers.ERR_UNABLE_TO_RECOVER
    Not used.
    org.apache.jena.rdfxml.arp1.ARPErrorNumbers.ERR_URI_NOT_NORMAL_FORM_C
    WG decision on williams-01.
    org.apache.jena.rdfxml.arp1.ARPErrorNumbers.WARN_BAD_XML
     
    org.apache.jena.rdfxml.arp1.ARPErrorNumbers.WARN_LEGAL_REUSE_OF_ID
    Last supported in Jena 2.1 - too expensive.
    org.apache.jena.rdfxml.arp1.ARPErrorNumbers.WARN_MINOR_INTERNAL_ERROR
    No longer used.
    org.apache.jena.rdfxml.arp1.ARPErrorNumbers.WARN_QNAME_AS_ID
    Superceded by the more general ARPErrorNumbers.WARN_BAD_NAME
    org.apache.jena.rdfxml.arp1.ARPErrorNumbers.WARN_URI_COMPOSING_CHAR
    WG decision on williams-01.
    org.apache.jena.rdfxml.arp1.ARPErrorNumbers.WARN_XMLBASE_MISSING
    ARPErrorNumbers.IGN_NO_BASE_URI_SPECIFIED

    org.apache.jena.vocabulary.VCARD4.longitude

    org.apache.jena.vocabulary.VCARD4.X400
  • Deprecated Methods
    Method
    Description
    org.apache.jena.graph.impl.GraphPlain.plain()
    From Jena5, graphs are all "same term", except GraphMemValue which is only used in the Model API.
    org.apache.jena.graph.impl.GraphPlain.plain(Graph)
    From Jena5, graphs are all "same term".
    org.apache.jena.graph.NodeFactory.createLiteral(LiteralLabel)
    Making nodes directly from LiteralLabel may be removed.
    org.apache.jena.graph.Triple.getMatchObject()
    Use Triple.getObject().
    org.apache.jena.graph.Triple.getMatchPredicate()
    Use Triple.getPredicate().
    org.apache.jena.graph.Triple.getMatchSubject()
    Use Triple.getSubject().
    org.apache.jena.rdf.model.Model.getReader(String)
    Use RIOT via org.apache.jena.riot.RDFDataMgr or call Model.read(java.lang.String).
    org.apache.jena.rdf.model.Model.getWriter(String)
    Use RIOT via org.apache.jena.riot.RDFDataMgr or call Model.write(java.io.Writer).
    org.apache.jena.rdf.model.Model.write(OutputStream)
    Use write(OutputStream, "RDF/XML")
    org.apache.jena.rdf.model.Model.write(Writer)
    Use write(Writer, "RDF/XML")
    org.apache.jena.rdf.model.ModelFactory.createMemModelMaker()
    Use org.apache.jena.ontapi.
    org.apache.jena.rdf.model.ModelFactory.createOntologyModel()
    Use org.apache.jena.ontapi.
    org.apache.jena.rdf.model.ModelFactory.createOntologyModel(String)
    Use org.apache.jena.ontapi.
    org.apache.jena.rdf.model.ModelFactory.createOntologyModel(OntModelSpec)
    Use org.apache.jena.ontapi.
    org.apache.jena.rdf.model.ModelFactory.createOntologyModel(OntModelSpec, ModelMaker, Model)
    Use org.apache.jena.ontapi.
    org.apache.jena.rdf.model.ModelFactory.createOntologyModel(OntModelSpec, Model)
    Use org.apache.jena.ontapi.
    org.apache.jena.util.FileManager.addCacheModel(String, Model)
    org.apache.jena.util.FileManager.create()
    Use StreamManager
    org.apache.jena.util.FileManager.create(LocationMapper)
    Use StreamManager.
    org.apache.jena.util.FileManager.createStd()
    Use StreamManager
    org.apache.jena.util.FileManager.get()
    Use RDFDataMgr to read RDF files. Use StreamManager if needed.
    org.apache.jena.util.FileManager.getFromCache(String)
    org.apache.jena.util.FileManager.hasCachedModel(String)
    org.apache.jena.util.FileManager.isCachingModels()
    org.apache.jena.util.FileManager.loadModel(String)
    Use RDFDataMgr
    org.apache.jena.util.FileManager.readModel(Model, String)
    Use RDFDataMgr
    org.apache.jena.util.FileManager.removeCacheModel(String)
    org.apache.jena.util.FileManager.resetCache()
    org.apache.jena.util.FileManager.setGlobalFileManager(FileManager)
    Use StreamManager.setGlobal
    org.apache.jena.util.FileManager.setModelCaching(boolean)
    org.apache.jena.util.FileManagerImpl.addLocatorClassLoader(ClassLoader)
    org.apache.jena.util.FileManagerImpl.addLocatorFile()
    org.apache.jena.util.FileManagerImpl.addLocatorFile(String)
    org.apache.jena.util.FileManagerImpl.addLocatorURL()
    org.apache.jena.util.FileManagerImpl.addLocatorZip(String)
    org.apache.jena.util.LocationMapper.get()
    Use StreamManager and LocationMapper from org.apache.jena.riot.system.stream.
    org.apache.jena.util.SplitIRI.splitXML10(String)
    Retained as a record of previous split handling.
  • Deprecated Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    org.apache.jena.rdfxml.arp1.ARP()
    Direct access to this RDF/XML parser is planned for removal. Please contact the Jena development community for details.
    org.apache.jena.rdfxml.arp1.RDFXMLReader()
    org.apache.jena.rdfxml.arp1.RDFXMLReader(boolean)

    The RDFWriter may be replaced,

    The RDFWriter may be replaced.

    Use StreamManager and LocationMapper from org.apache.jena.riot.system.stream.

    Use StreamManager and LocationMapper from org.apache.jena.riot.system.stream.
    org.apache.jena.util.LocationMapper(Model)
    Use StreamManager and LocationMapper from org.apache.jena.riot.system.stream.
    org.apache.jena.util.LocationMapper(LocationMapper)
